title: Staying healthy in the heat - Described video - Canada.ca
content:
## Staying healthy in the heat - Described video
The sun rises and moves across the sky. A farmer stands in  the middle of a field with sunflowers. A thermometer appears on the right of  the screen with the temperature slowly rising.
The camera moves to reveal the image of an elderly person,  two young children, a person in a hospital bed, and a construction worker. A  city scene with skyscrapers appear, and cars and a bus are zooming back and  forth. The thermometer disappears. A cell phone appears with an image of the  sun and then an image of a sign with an exclamation mark on it.
An elderly woman appears in the window of a building where  the air conditioner is on. A man pushes a stroller with a baby in it. He moves  into the shade of a tree. A crane moves up and down as a construction worker  drinks water. A woman jogging, runs towards a fountain to have a drink of  water.
Text on screen: Canada.ca/health
